stemHtml: In flight, windshield icing occurs, within the view line of both pilots, what adjustments should the flight crew do?

options.a: Both flight crew members should adjust to see properly.
options.b: The first officer has to adjust to see properly.
options.c: The captain has to adjust to see properly.
options.d: The flight crew should not do anything since icing does not have any effect on their view.
